Title: Registration Form - Personal View
Preconditions: Browser open; registration page accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/register
[ACT] Select 'Personal' account type if toggle present
[ASSERT] Verify form renders all fields
Assertions:
[DOM] 'First Name' input visible
[DOM] 'Last Name' input visible
[DOM] 'Email' input visible
[DOM] 'Password' input visible
[DOM] 'Confirm Password' input visible
[DOM] Terms/conditions checkbox present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] GET /register returns HTTP 200
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; console TypeError; form fields missing after load

Title: Create Account - Personal User
Preconditions: Registration page open; unique test email available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/register
[ACT] Select 'Personal' account type
[ACT] Fill 'First Name': 'TestFirst'
[ACT] Fill 'Last Name': 'TestLast'
[ACT] Fill 'Email': testuser+{{timestamp}}@example.com
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Fill 'Confirm Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Check terms/conditions checkbox
[ACT] Click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] Wait for success message or redirect
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Fill 'Email': testuser+{{timestamp}}@example.com
[ACT] Fill 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
Assertions:
[DOM] Success confirmation message visible after registration
[STATE] User redirected to account page or login page
[STATE] Login with new credentials succeeds
[STATE] User is authenticated after login
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200 after login
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner visible >5s; 4xx/5xx on registration endpoint; redirect to /error page; login fails after registration
Cleanup: Delete test account via admin after test

Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors

Title: Email Verification - Mandatory
Preconditions: Mandatory email verification enabled in admin; email access available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/register
[ACT] Register new account with valid unique email
[WAIT] Wait for post-registration screen
[NAV] Attempt to navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Login with new credentials before verifying email
[ASSERT] Login is rejected with verification required error
[ACT] Open verification link from email inbox
[WAIT] Wait for verification confirmation
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Login with same credentials after verification
Assertions:
[STATE] Login attempt before verification is rejected
[DOM] Error message: email verification required shown
[DOM] Option to resend verification email present
[STATE] Login succeeds after clicking verification link
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200 after verified login
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Login succeeds before email verified; verification link broken; no resend option; console TypeError

Title: Login - Temporary Lockout
Preconditions: Valid user account; account lockout enabled after 5 failed attempts
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Fill 'Email': {{USER_EMAIL}}
[ACT] Fill 'Password': 'WrongPass1!'
[ACT] Click 'Sign In'
[ACT] Repeat incorrect login 4 more times (5 total)
[ASSERT] Lockout message displayed after 5th attempt
[ACT] Attempt login with correct credentials
[ASSERT] Login still denied due to lockout
[WAIT] Wait for lockout timeout period
[ACT] Attempt login again with correct credentials
Assertions:
[DOM] Lockout error message shown after 5 failed attempts
[STATE] Login with correct credentials fails during lockout period
[STATE] Login succeeds after lockout timeout expires
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns 4xx during lockout
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: No lockout after 5 failures; lockout persists beyond timeout; correct password accepted during lockout; console TypeError

Title: Login - Token Generation
Preconditions: Valid user credentials; browser DevTools / network tab accessible
Assertions:
[STATE] Login succeeds and user is redirected
[FORMAT] /connect/token response contains 'access_token' (JWT format)
[FORMAT] Response includes 'refresh_token'
[FORMAT] Token payload contains expected claims (sub; email; roles)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /connect/token returns HTTP 200
[NETWORK] Response body contains access_token and refresh_token fields
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: POST /connect/token returns non-200; access_token missing from response; token not JWT format; console TypeError

Title: Login - Token Persistence
Preconditions: User logged in with valid session
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Login with valid credentials
[WAIT] Wait for successful redirect to account area
[NAV] Reload page (F5 / browser refresh)
[WAIT] Wait for page to load
[ASSERT] User is still logged in after reload
[WAIT] Wait for token refresh interval (if observable)
Assertions:
[STATE] User remains authenticated after page reload
[STATE] No re-login prompt shown after reload
[NETWORK] Token refresh request observed (if auto-refresh active)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET account page returns HTTP 200 without redirect to login
[NETWORK] Token refresh call (if triggered) returns HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: User redirected to login after page reload; token refresh returns 4xx/5xx; console TypeError

Title: Logout - Token Revocation
Preconditions: User logged in with active session; DevTools network tab accessible
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Login with valid credentials
[WAIT] Wait for authenticated session
[ACT] Note the access_token value from /connect/token response
[ACT] Click logout button or navigate to logout
[WAIT] Wait for logout to complete
[ASSERT] /revoke/token call observed in network tab
[ACT] Attempt to use old token in a direct API request to {{BACK_URL}}
Assertions:
[STATE] Logout completes and user is redirected to login or home page
[STATE] Old access_token rejected by API (returns 401)
[NETWORK] POST /revoke/token called during logout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST /revoke/token returns HTTP 200
[NETWORK] Old token returns 401 on subsequent API call
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Logout does not call /revoke/token; old token still valid after logout; console TypeError

Title: Impersonation - No Persistent Side Effects
Preconditions: Customer has items in cart before impersonation; admin account separate
Steps:

[NAV] Navigate to {{ADMIN_URL}} and log in as admin
[ACT] Initiate impersonation of the customer
[WAIT] Wait for customer storefront context
[ACT] View the cart but do NOT modify it
[ACT] Stop the impersonation session
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/login
[ACT] Log in as the customer independently
[NAV] Navigate to cart page
[ASSERT] Customer cart is unchanged from before impersonation
Assertions:
[STATE] Customer cart contents identical before and after impersonation session
[STATE] No items added; removed; or quantity-changed during impersonation
[STATE] Customer saved addresses unchanged
[STATE] Customer profile data unchanged
[STATE] No orphaned sessions remain after impersonation ends
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
[NETWORK] No unexpected mutations to customer data during impersonation
Failure_Signals: Cart items changed after impersonation session; customer addresses or profile modified; orphaned session detected; console TypeError
